tagline: First-to-market climate-controlled portable storage franchise backed by BELFOR Franchise Group with an asset-heavy labor-light model built for scalable recurring revenue
description_short: COOL-BINZ is a climate-controlled portable storage franchise where owners build an asset-heavy fleet of all-steel insulated bins and rent them to residential and commercial customers. Backed by BELFOR Franchise Group the business offers multiple revenue streams from storage containers mobile offices and refrigeration units with low labor needs and recurring rental income.
market_intelligence_insight: Portable storage container market valued at ~5.1B in 2025 growing at 5.6% CAGR through 2034. Climate-controlled units command a 30% premium over standard containers.
item_19_headline: Affiliate-owned Naples location averaged 7.2 months rented per bin per year with average rental rates of $509 per month in 2025
ongoing_support: coaching,sales support,marketing support,operations manual updates,conventions,refresher training,call center leads,software support
